themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 12 verses. Commentary leans on "Then I came to the governors beyond the river, and gave them the king's letters. Now the king...". Cross references echo "Kingdom".

themes.label: Presence
themes.summary: This chapter highlights God’s nearness, abiding presence, indwelling, or covenant companionship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "And I arose in the night, I and some few men with me; neither told I any man what my God had...". Word-study detail reinforces "אֶל: - near, with or among; often in general, to".

themes.label: Grace/Mercy
themes.summary: This chapter highlights undeserved favor, mercy, forgiveness, compassion, or pardon. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses.

themes.label: Provision
themes.summary: This chapter emphasizes God’s supplying care, nourishment, sufficiency, or generous provision. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses.

themes.label: Suffering
themes.summary: This chapter deals with affliction, sorrow, trial, lament, endurance, or hardship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse.

themes.label: Fear/Anxiety
themes.summary: This chapter deals with fear, dread, anxiety, alarm, or the call not to be afraid. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "Wherefore the king said unto me, Why is thy countenance sad, seeing thou art not sick? this i...". Word-study detail reinforces "וָֽאִירָ֖א: afraid - to fear; morally to revere; causatively to frighten".
